title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and list models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat endpoint.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper with syntax highlighting and conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Minimal React chatbot frontend that talks to Ollama over REST.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose snippets for running Ollama containerized.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Template repo for building RAG pipelines with Ollama embeddings and LangChain.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing the JavaScript SDK for Ollama.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official PyPI package for the Ollama Python SDK.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and reactive wrappers.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-laravel
summary: Laravel package that wraps Ollama for artisan commands and queue jobs.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP client for Ollama with GenServer pooling and Phoenix LiveView examples.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for chatting with local models.
